'''AlienTech eSports''' is a Portuguese team.

==History==

=== 2016 Season ===
'''AlienTech eSports''' qualifies for [[EU_Challenger_Series/2017_Season/Spring_Qualifiers|2017 EUCS Spring Qualifiers]] after beating [[K1ck Black]] 2-1 in the semifinals of [[EU_Challenger_Series/2017_Season/Spring_ Qualifiers/Open_Qualifier|2017 EUCS Spring Open Qualifier]].
